title: Level 914
wikitext:
{{CSS|content= .theme-fandomdesktop-dark { --theme-link-color: rgb(0, 163, 255); --theme-sticky-nav-text-color: #FFFFFF; --theme-sticky-nav-text-color--hover: white; } .theme-fandomdesktop-light { --theme-link-color: rgb(0, 163, 255); --theme-sticky-nav-text-color: rgb(77, 193, 0); --theme-sticky-nav-text-color--hover: rgb(77, 193, 0); } }} {{DISPLAYTITLE: Level 914: "Desolate Airplane"}} {{Transparent Theme 2}} {{Background|file=Lights off on the aircraft.png}}
Someone taps you on the shoulder. You wake up from a deep and long sleep and see before you... a figure that resembles a person, but in fact, it is not a person at all. You do not even understand whether this is a real living being or not. Anyway, It disappears after a moment. It seems like this is either a dream within a dream or just a hallucination. You look about. For a moment, you do not understand how you ended up here because you have been through [[Level List|so much]] already… but then, this thought is anomalously forgotten. So, you are on the plane. On the same plane, in the same place and at the same time, when your destiny changed forever. But your mind does not currently understand that you are in [[The Backrooms]]. It, and therefore you, think that you are at [[The Frontrooms|the home]]. However, you remember very well that there was a suspicious [[Entity 9|woman]] sitting next to you who never looked you in the face and vice versa. But… She is not here. And that family that was sitting behind you, with the cheerful child who wanted to be friends with you, is not here. There is no one here. You are left alone. This place does strange things to your mind. It made it so that at first you would not realize that you were in The Backrooms. But after you notice that the plane is completely empty, you finally realize that. "But how does the airplane fly?" — you ask, and go to see if there are any stewardesses or at least a cockpit nearby. After half an hour of searching, you find nothing. There are no traces that people have ever been here. The plane seemed to take off on its own. You also discover that the cockpit is completely missing. All you could not check was the business lounge. It was locked up, and you figured there might be other losers in there like you. And then you noticed something metal under the chair. It turned out to be the key! You quickly try to open the door leading to the business lounge, and you succeed! All you see is a hall frozen in time. There are snacks here, which means there really were people here… maybe. But why are snacks only available in the business lounge, and why in that? In addition, it looks like the snacks do not past its expiration date, which means you will live a little longer. You are happy about this at least, but suddenly you hear a knock on the porthole. You look into it and see… [[File:Gray humanoid creature in the sky.png|alt=???|center]]
Welcome to another nightmare of these places.

{{Class Variable|safety=Unsafe|entity=Presence of Lethal Entities}} '''Level 914''' is the 915th level of The Backrooms which is, for the most part, an airplane with not a single soul. It was discovered in March 21, 2025 by a wanderer who, after falling asleep on [[Level 36]], woke up on '''Level 914'''. This level turned out to be the plane on board which he got to The Backrooms. This means that all areas of the level, except for The Apron Bus and the Sky, have common features, but the layout itself can highly vary. Besides, only those who have entered The Backrooms on board the plane can enter the level. == Description == The level is divided into three areas: # The Main Part of Aircraft (abbr. MPA); # The Business Lounge; # The Apron Bus. In addition, there is one special area in the level that you can not get into but can see. It is called "The Sky". === The Main Part of Aircraft === {{Blurimage|file=Inside the airplane.png|caption=A photo of the Main Part of the Aircraft at the '''Level 914''', featuring the phenomenon known as The Invisible Steward.}} '''The Main Part of Aircraft''' is a long, relatively narrow corridor that is also the main area of ​​most planes in [[The Frontrooms]] and consists of approximately 6 rows, counting from the nose. Each row contains about 40–50 seats, meaning there are ~300 of them in this area. These chairs have pull-out tables, although they are, de facto, not needed, since there is no food in this area. In addition, the seats may even seem too hard and uncomfortable to some, even if they were not like that on the plane a wanderer was on in [[The Backrooms]]. Above him, the wanderer can notice luggage racks, which are also empty, like the entire area. The fact is that in the '''MPA''' must not find a single object except for the key that unlocks the door leading to the Business Lounge. The "emptiness" of this area also means that must not hear the voice of the controller or flight attendant who will talk about landing or something else. It should be noted that this rule also applies to the Business Lounge. Another feature of this area that distinguishes it from the plane in which the wanderer gets to The Backrooms is that the portholes are always closed by default for unknown reasons. In any case, it protects wanderers from Its attacks. The only danger in this area, apart from the phenomena, is the complete lack of supplies and It. The second danger mentioned above is truly worth noting, much more dangerous than any other danger in the level. The thing is, if look through the portholes, there will be a gray humanoid creature that will abnormally recognize that someone is watching it after a few seconds, and then break the porthole, pick up the observer in his arms and move him to the penultimate area of ​​the level - The Apron Bus. There are no items to be found here except for a hidden key that can open the door leading to the next area - The Business Lounge. === The Business Lounge === {{Blurimage|file=The business lounge of the airplane.png|caption=A photo of the Business Lounge.}} '''The Business Lounge''' is an improved version of the Main Part of Aircraft, although in some characteristics this area is even "worse" than the MPA. For example, there are now two rows of seats on the sides, but in total there are already 7 rows in this area, counting from the bow. The portholes, in turn, are already open by default, unlike the previous area. The seats have really become much more comfortable and softer, and the luggage racks are now locked and cannot be opened. In addition, sometimes you can find robotic trays on wheels with in-flight food on them. This in-flight food is no different from its counterpart in The Frontrooms, meaning it does not contain any supplies that are only found in The Backrooms. It should be noted that the Business Lounge is the only area in the level that has supplies at all. Although the research logs of the discoverer of this level were lost, the same person's research log describing '''the Business Lounge''' was found in [[The End]] a week after '''Level 914''' was published in [[The Database]]. This research log will be attached below.
Excerpt from Level 914 Research Log. Day 1.
This is a second area that I found and that is a long hall, similar to an airplane business lounge. The armchairs here, at least for me personally, are quite comfortable and soft. It seems that this area does not pose any danger other than those in the main one. The only thing I do not like here is the narrow distances between the rows. I don't know what will happen when the lights go out. Wait. Really? I can not believe my eyes. A robot on wheels just rode in front of me, holding a tray in its hands. I like it, but I am not sure it cannot hurt me. I think I should follow it. I will update the log in about half an hour.
=== The Apron Bus === {{Blurimage|file=The Apron Bus.png|caption=The Apron Bus.}} '''The Apron Bus''' is a long hallway that tries to look like the apron bus from [[The Frontrooms]], but everything here is done in only blue, green and white colors, for example, the floor is covered in blue flowers and grass, which makes one think that the floor in this area is made of dirt, although wanderers who have visited '''The Apron Bus''' claim otherwise. There are metal handrails that are twisted in a sinuous manner at the top. These handrails are so cold that you can even get second-degree frostbite. In addition, here you can find seats, the analogues of which can be found in The Frontrooms, but here, the seats are made exclusively of blue material, and the fastening is of white. One may also find the gray iron sliding doors, but they are closed, making it impossible to escape from the area. It should be noted that each structure in this area, which was mentioned before, appears in a cyclical manner, namely, every 1.5 meters (~5 ft). In this area, mental dangers arise, namely, the wanderer's mind will be constantly filled with only one thought, which says that he needs to move forward. In fact, this entire area is a trap, and eventually, after walking 10 km (6.2 miles), the wanderer will encounter It. A bloody smile will begin to appear on the lower part of its face, and after a few seconds, It will simply eat its victim. It is unknown what happened to those eaten, but most likely they were simply killed instantly, or sent to eternal torment in an unknown place. === The Sky === '''The Sky''' is an infinite sky, almost identical to the sky from The Frontrooms. The clouds here are perpetually dark gray and the sun is stuck in a perpetual sunset state. In addition, there is a division into endless "layers" of clouds. If you "go" up a certain distance, you will find a new layer, and so on. The only entity present on the level lives here on an almost permanent basis. It should be noted that there is very little information about this area due to the fact that it is impossible to get into it, at least at the time of writing. ''Note'': At this time, no evidence has been found that any of '''The Sky''' photographs are genuine. It is believed that it is impossible to take a picture of this area because It will immediately notice whoever took the picture. == Phenomena == |-| The Invisible Steward= {{Phenomenon Class|frequency=3|effectiveness=5|danger=0}} Since each a wanderer is almost alone on this level, his mind will become clouded, and he will slowly go crazy. Because of this, he will also be able to see a human figure in a steward's uniform, known as The Invisible Steward in the MPA and Business Lounge, although he is not there. This Steward is just a mirage. Also, if anyone tries to follow him, they will not be able to, because he will simply disappear into thin air in an instant. Despite this, '''The Invisible Steward''' can still be captured in photographs, why this is possible is unclear. Perhaps this is irrefutable proof that, strange as it may sound, '''The Invisible Steward''' does exist. |-| Blackout= {{Phenomenon Class|frequency=5|effectiveness=5|danger=5}} {{Blurimage|file=Lights off on the aircraft.png|caption=The Blackout on the MPA}} Every 7–8 hours, an extremely dangerous event known as the "'''Blackout'''" will occur in all parts of the level except the Sky. During this event, almost all the lighting on the plane/apron bus is turned off, the portholes are closed, and most importantly, entities other than It begin to appear. These include: * [[Entity 3|Smilers]]; * [[Entity 36|Lighters]]; * [[Entity 10|Skin-Stealers]]; * [[Entity 5|Clumps]]; * [[Entity 9|Facelings]]. All these entities will be extremely aggressive towards a wanderer, and it will be almost impossible to escape, if only because there is nowhere to hide, and even if someone manages to hide, they will still find him. The event will last exactly an hour, after which all entities will instantly disappear, the lighting will instantly be restored, and the portholes will instantly open. Also, if the entities leave wounds on someone, they will instantly disappear. |-| The Cloudy Event= {{Phenomenon Class|frequency=?|effectiveness=0|danger=1}} '''The Cloudy Event''' is an event in the '''Level 914''' that is a cloud leak from the outside of the level. They are completely safe, but they can reduce visibility, and this can already be quite dangerous, as it will make a wanderer vulnerable to entities during the Blackout. File:The cloudy event in the aircraft.png File:The cloudy event in the apron bus.png |-| Thunderstorm= {{Phenomenon Class|frequency=2|effectiveness=?|danger=3}} {{Blurimage|file=Thunderstorm from the aircraft.png|caption=Thunderstorm. The photo taken a second before It arrived.}} '''Thunderstorm''' is an event in the '''Level 914''' or, more precisely, in its first two areas: the Main Part of Aircraft and the Business Lounge. It is thunder and lightnings, repeating every few seconds. There is a ~0.65% chance that lightning will strike the plane, causing it to explode along with the wanderer who was on it. If lightning strikes It, it will become extremely aggressive, and even if its future victim was not looking out the window, It will break it and drag him into the Apron Bus. '''Thunderstorms''' usually end within a few hours, but can sometimes last for days, if not weeks. In addition, the appearance of the '''Thunderstorm''' at the level is cyclical; namely, it starts every week. With each passing week, the chance that a wanderer will be killed in some way by the effects of '''Thunderstorm''' increases. == Entities == During Blackout, everybody can encounter many entities on the level, but there is only one creature that is constantly present on the level, which will be discussed below. It turns out that It is not always present at Level 914, as [[The Database]] has received reports of wanderers noticing It on other levels, and the fact is that for now it is believed that It has only one instance. Its properties are only being studied, and it is quite possible that even this information has already become irrelevant. === It === {{Blurimage|file=Man with aura.png|caption=A static image of It's small shape at an unknown level.}} '''It''' is the "main" entity on '''Level 914''', which has two shapes — a small one and a giant one. The small shape is that of a middle-aged man, whose outline is completely white, and whose body is filled with a gradient of blue and sky blue. In addition, this shape emits a large "aura"It means the aura in the esoteric sense. and glows neon in the dark. This shape appears only once in the level: when a wanderer wakes up from someone tapping you on the shoulder. '''It''' tapped him. After this, '''It''' to teleport to the Sky and transform into its giant shape, which has not yet been seen on any other levels except '''Level 914''' itself. The giant shape of '''It''' is a huge gray humanoid with elongated limbs, but the only image of its giant shape shows us only half of its body, that is, the body up to the waist, which means that it is quite possible that It simply does not have a body part below the waist. In addition, it is unknown which shape is its true shape, but it is known for sure that regardless of what shape '''It''' is in, it will always be extremely aggressive towards all living things. == Colonies and Outposts == This level is subject to Phenomenon 15, better known as [[Phenomenon 15|Alone]]. This means that a wanderer cannot meet other wanderers here, which means that nobody cannot build an outpost either. == Entrances and Exits == === Entrances === The only known way to get to '''Level 914''' is to fall asleep on [[Level 36]]. There may be new entrances as well, as the level itself was only recently discovered. === Exits === * If try to open the door leading to the Business Lounge with what turns out to be the [[Object 2|Level Key]], a one will be taken to a [[Level List|random level]]. * Eating a snack that has a small chance of containing a sleeping pill will take a wanderer to [[Level 610]]. * If someone somehow manages to escape It at the end of the Apron Bus, he will end up at [[The End]]. {{Footnotes}}
